title: Add experiment workflow and sweep helpers
author: GLDRoger

data.description: Reproducible local-to-CUDA experiment workflow runbook for moving from Apple Silicon smoke tests to leaderboard-oriented sweeps
Wave-1 sweep launcher that isolates each run into its own working directory and records command/env metadata
Log parser that extracts stable metrics from trainer logs into a JSONL-friendly ledger format while ignoring source-dump prefixes

novel_contributions: Added a reproducible local-to-CUDA experiment workflow runbook
Added a wave-1 sweep launcher with per-run isolated working directories
Added a log parser that emits stable metrics in JSONL-friendly ledger format
Documented the trainer log source-dump quirk in AGENTS.md
Linked the new experiment workflow from the README Apple Silicon getting-started section
